text.title: Role Cheatsheet Generator Examples
text.summary: One worked example: generating the software-architect cheatsheet at the pro tier.

example.description: Generator invocation, resulting JSON shape, and rendered markdown.
example.code:
<!-- generated-do-not-edit corpus_version: 2026-05-23 role: software-architect tier: pro top_n: 10 overrides_merged: 2 --> # Software Architect — Top 10 Faion Methodologies
1. pro/infra/greenfield-infra-decision-matrix 2. pro/infra/capacity-planning-at-design-time ...
